cards-description.my-portfolio: This is super portfolio project, to show my skills and experiences. It's a Next.js app with Tailwind CSS and Typescript. integrated with AI tools to generate Email and a markdown editor.
cards-description.lnk-bio: This is a link shortener that allows you to create a custom page with your social media links. It's a Next.js app with Tailwind CSS and Typescript.
cards-description.prep-pal: This is a tool that helps you to prepare for a job interview. It uses OpenAI's GPT-3 to generate questions and answers based on the job description.
